# Atlas Corporate Services

> Atlas Corporate Services is a specialist corporate services firm based in the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC), Dubai, UAE. We provide DIFC company formation, fund structuring, family office setup, prescribed company (SPV) formation, DIFC foundations, company secretarial, compliance, accounting and tax services.

## About

Atlas Corporate Services assists international businesses, family offices, fund managers and high-net-worth individuals to establish and manage corporate structures within the DIFC. We operate under the DIFC's English common law framework and work with clients across the GCC, UK, Europe, South Asia and beyond.

Contact: info@atlascorp.ae
Website: https://www.atlascorp.ae

## Services

- [DIFC Company Setup](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/difc-company-setup): Full company formation, licensing, registered office and compliance support for DIFC entities.
- [Family Office Setup](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/family-office-setup): Single and multi-family office structuring, DFSA licensing, governance and ongoing compliance.
- [Fund Setup](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/fund-setup): Investment fund formation, DFSA licensing, PPM drafting and investor onboarding in DIFC.
- [Fund & SPV Support](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/fund-spv-support): Ongoing fund administration, SPV management, regulatory reporting and governance support.
- [DIFC Foundations](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/difc-foundations): Foundation formation for wealth protection, succession planning and philanthropy.
- [DIFC Prescribed Company (SPV)](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/difc-prescribed-company-spv): Prescribed Company setup for investment holding and GCC wealth structuring.
- [Company Secretarial & Governance](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/company-secretarial-governance): DIFC statutory compliance, board meeting support, shareholder services and governance advisory.
- [Compliance & Economic Substance](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/compliance-economic-substance): ESR, AML/CFT, corporate tax compliance and regulatory liaison.
- [Accounting & Tax](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/accounting-tax): Bookkeeping, financial statements, UAE corporate tax and VAT compliance.
- [Residency & Banking Concierge](https://www.atlascorp.ae/service/residency-banking-concierge): UAE residency visa processing and corporate bank account opening.
